htmlContent:
NC Statewide Mapping Advisory Committee Meeting

Agenda

January 20, 2021

1:30 - 3:30pm

Location: Meeting is through Web Conference only. No physical location.

Phone: No call-in number. Audio provided through Web Conference link.

Web Conference: Join meeting

SMAC Web Site – http://it.nc.gov/gicc | NC OneMap Web Site - www.nconemap.gov

Welcome/Introductions – Paul Badr

  • Approval of October 14, 2020 minutes

Framework+ Datasets (60 min.) (Opportunities, development, maintenance, and issues for base data important to NC)

  • Orthoimagery - Ben Shelton
  • Cadastral - John Bridgers
  • Elevation – John Lay
    • Updates on Contours and DEM QC and “sealing”
  • Hydrography - Cam McNutt
  • Geodetic Control - Gary Thompson
  • Administrative/Governmental Units
    • County Boundaries - Gary Thompson
    • Municipal Boundaries – Sarah Wray
  • Transportation – Sarah Wray
  • Addresses - Anna Verrill

Working Groups (40 min.) (A report is expected only for those working groups listed)

  • Hydrography Working Group - Cam McNutt
  • Orthoimagery and Elevation - Gary Thompson
  • NC Board on Geographic Names - Cam McNutt
    • SMAC Discussion and Approval
      • Simone Mountain
      • Stiles Mountain
  • Working Group for Municipal Boundaries - John Bridgers
  • 2022 Reference Frame – Gary Thompson
  • Metadata Committee – Sarah Wray
    • Update on refresh of documents/tools on NC OneMap (www.nconemap.gov/pages/metadata)
2021 Meetings
2021 Meetings
Wed 4/14
Wed 7/14
Wed 10/13

Regular Status Updates (10 min.)

  • USGS/National Geospatial Programs Office - Silvia Terziotti
  • NC OneMap - David Giordano
  • NextGen 911 – Matthew McLamb

Other Business (5 min.)

  • Review and approval of modified SMAC Bylaws – Paul Badr/David Giordano
    • Adjustment to reflect the correct statutes and bring bylaws in line with those of other subcommittees

Action Item Review (5 min.)

Adjourn
